title: Outstanding ADR Implementation Workplan
description: Consolidated workplan for 6 outstanding ADRs: 032b, 042, 044-config, 044-git, 045, 046. Organized by dependency tiers so foundational work unblocks downstream features.

phases.name: Foundation — HexFlo SpacetimeDB Migration (ADR-032b)
phases.description: Migrate HexFlo coordination from direct SQLite (SwarmDb) to SpacetimeDB via IStatePort. This is the prerequisite for all other ADRs.

gate.command: cargo build -p hex-nexus --release && cargo test -p hex-nexus

tasks.name: Create hexflo-coordination SpacetimeDB module
tasks.description: New module in spacetime-modules/hexflo-coordination/ with Swarm, SwarmTask, SwarmAgent, HexFloMemory tables and all reducers (swarm_init, task_create, task_complete, agent_heartbeat, etc.)

tasks.name: Extend IStatePort with swarm/task/memory methods
tasks.description: Add swarm_init, swarm_status, task_create, task_complete, task_list, agent_heartbeat, cleanup_stale_agents, memory_store, memory_retrieve, memory_search to IStatePort trait.

tasks.name: Implement IStatePort in SpacetimeStateAdapter
tasks.description: Implement new IStatePort methods in SpacetimeStateAdapter using SpacetimeDB reducer calls and subscription reads.

tasks.name: Implement IStatePort in SqliteStateAdapter (fallback)
tasks.description: Mirror the new IStatePort methods in SqliteStateAdapter for offline/air-gapped fallback.

tasks.name: Refactor coordination layer to use IStatePort
tasks.description: Replace all direct SwarmDb/rusqlite calls in coordination/{mod,memory,cleanup}.rs with IStatePort method calls.

tasks.name: Migration script + deprecate SwarmDb
tasks.description: Add `hex nexus migrate-state` command. Remove persistence.rs (SwarmDb) after migration verified.

phases.name: State Unification — SpacetimeDB Single Source (ADR-042)
phases.description: Eliminate all in-memory HashMap state and SQLite session storage. hex-nexus becomes stateless compute.

gate.command: cargo build -p hex-nexus --release && cargo test -p hex-nexus

tasks.name: Unify HexFlo coordination database target
tasks.description: Change SpacetimeStateAdapter to write to hexflo-coordination database instead of hex-nexus database. Update .hex/state.json default.

tasks.name: Eliminate in-memory inference state
tasks.description: Remove state.inference_endpoints HashMap. All inference CRUD goes through SpacetimeDB inference-gateway module.

tasks.name: Eliminate in-memory coordination state
tasks.description: Remove state.hexflo, state.instances, state.worktree_locks, state.task_claims HashMaps. Replace with SpacetimeDB reducer calls.

tasks.name: Add Project table to hexflo-coordination module
tasks.description: Add Project table with register_project/remove_project reducers. Dashboard subscribes instead of REST fetch.

tasks.name: Migrate sessions from SQLite to SpacetimeDB
tasks.description: Move chat session storage from hub.db SQLite to chat-relay SpacetimeDB module.

phases.name: Git Integration — Read-Only Queries (ADR-044-git Phase 1)
phases.description: Add git2-based query service to hex-nexus with REST endpoints for status, log, diff, worktrees. Replace dashboard mock data.

tasks.name: Implement GitService module (status, log, diff, worktree)
tasks.description: New hex-nexus/src/git/ module using git2 crate. Stateless — reads filesystem on every call. 5s TTL cache for expensive ops. Path validation against registered projects.

tasks.name: Add REST endpoints under /api/{project_id}/git/
tasks.description: Routes: GET status, GET log (paginated), GET log/{sha}, GET diff, GET branches, GET worktrees. All project-scoped with path validation.

tasks.name: Wire dashboard UI — GitStatusBadge, CommitLog, WorktreePanel
tasks.description: Replace MOCK_WORKTREES in ProjectDetail.tsx with real data. Add GitStatusBadge to project header. Add CommitLog component.

phases.name: Config Sync to SpacetimeDB (ADR-044-config)
phases.description: Sync repo config files (.hex/, .claude/, docs/adrs/) into SpacetimeDB tables on nexus startup. Dashboard subscribes reactively.

tasks.name: Add config tables to hexflo-coordination module
tasks.description: Add ProjectConfig, SkillEntry, AgentDefinition tables with sync reducers to hexflo-coordination SpacetimeDB module.

tasks.name: Implement config sync on nexus startup
tasks.description: Read .hex/blueprint.json, .claude/settings.json, .claude/skills/*.md, .claude/agents/*.yml, docs/adrs/ on startup and push to SpacetimeDB via reducers.

tasks.name: Dashboard subscribes to config tables
tasks.description: Replace REST/hardcoded config reads with SpacetimeDB subscriptions for skills, agents, ADR index, and project config.

phases.name: ADR Compliance Enforcement (ADR-045)
phases.description: Add rule-based ADR compliance checking to hex analyze. Pre-commit hook integration. Agent context injection.

tasks.name: Implement compliance rule engine in hex-cli
tasks.description: New analysis pass in hex analyze that checks code against ADR rules. Rules loaded from {project}/.hex/adr-rules.toml. Initial rules: adr-001-no-cross-adapter, adr-001-domain-purity, adr-014-no-mock-module, adr-039-no-rest-state.

tasks.name: Add Enforced-By frontmatter to ADRs
tasks.description: Add optional Enforced-By field to ADR parser. hex adr list shows enforcement status. ADR-001, ADR-014, ADR-039 get initial enforcement tags.

tasks.name: Pre-commit hook + --strict flag
tasks.description: hex analyze --adr-compliance as pre-commit hook. Warnings by default, --strict promotes to errors for CI.

tasks.name: Store compliance results in HexFlo memory
tasks.description: After analysis, store results as adr-compliance:{project_id} in HexFlo memory (SpacetimeDB). Dashboard shows compliance status.

phases.name: Workplan Lifecycle Management (ADR-046)
phases.description: End-to-end workplan lifecycle: creation from requirements/ADRs, SpacetimeDB tracking, phase gate execution, reporting, git correlation.

gate.command: cargo build -p hex-nexus --release && cargo test -p hex-nexus -- workplan

tasks.name: Add WorkplanExecution, WorkplanTask, WorkplanGateResult tables
tasks.description: Extend hexflo-coordination SpacetimeDB module with workplan tables and reducers for lifecycle management.

tasks.name: Unify workplan JSON format
tasks.description: Standardize the two existing JSON flavors into the canonical format from ADR-046. Migrate 15 existing workplans.

tasks.name: Implement phase gate execution in WorkplanExecutor
tasks.description: Phase gates actually run their command (build, test, analyze). Blocking gates halt advancement. Results stored in WorkplanGateResult.

tasks.name: Add workplan reporting endpoints + CLI
tasks.description: REST: GET active, GET history, GET status, GET report. CLI: hex plan active, hex plan history, hex plan report. Aggregate results with phase/task/commit breakdown.

tasks.name: Git correlation — link tasks to commits
tasks.description: Task completion sets commit_sha and worktree_branch. Report endpoint merges workplan timeline with git commit history from ADR-044-git.

tasks.name: MCP tools for workplan operations
tasks.description: Expose hex_plan_create, hex_plan_list, hex_plan_status, hex_plan_execute, hex_plan_pause, hex_plan_resume as MCP tools.

phases.name: Git Integration — Write Ops + WebSocket (ADR-044-git Phase 2)
phases.description: Worktree create/delete, background polling, WebSocket broadcast, BranchPicker and DiffViewer components.

tasks.name: Worktree create/delete endpoints
tasks.description: POST /api/{project_id}/git/worktrees and DELETE /api/{project_id}/git/worktrees/{name}. Uses git CLI (not git2) for worktree ops.

tasks.name: Background git status polling + WebSocket broadcast
tasks.description: Poll git status every 10s per registered project. Broadcast changes via ws_tx channel as project:<id>:git events.

tasks.name: DiffViewer + BranchPicker dashboard components
tasks.description: Wire existing DiffViewer component to GET /git/diff. Add BranchPicker dropdown to project header.

independent_tracks: P3 (Git Integration) — can start immediately, no SpacetimeDB dependency
P5 (ADR Compliance) — mostly independent, only P5.4 needs P2
